post.summary: Fetches proposal data for goods movements of a confirmation.
post.description: Fetches proposal data for goods movements of a confirmation that you specify using the necessary properties depending on the type of confirmation.

Group multiple requests into a single request payload, see [Batch Processing (OData Version 2.0)](https://www.odata.org/documentation/odata-version-2-0/batch-processing/).

*Please note that "Try it out" is not supported for this request.*

multipart/mixed;boundary=request-separat.example:
--request-separator
Content-Type: application/http
Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary

GET ProdnOrdConfMatlDocItm HTTP/1.1
Accept: application/json


--request-separator--

multipart/mixed.example:
--response-separator
Content-Type: application/http

HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Content-Type: application/json

{...}
--response-separator--

Batch.title: Assigns a material that is manufactured in batches or production lots to a specific batch.

Customer.title: Uniquely identifies a customer.
Customer.description: This customer number is used for managing customer special stocks.

EntryUnit.title: Specifies the unit of measure in which the goods movement or inventory count is entered.
EntryUnit.description: Enter a unit of measure here only if it differs from the default unit of measure.There are the following default units of measure:the order unit for goods receipts with reference to purchase ordersthe production unit for goods receipts with reference to production ordersthe unit of issue for other goods movementsIf the default unit of measure has not been defined in the material master record, the system will suggest the stockkeeping unit.

EntryUnitISOCode.title: ISO code for measurement units. An ISO code can be assigned to several internal measurement units of a dimension.
EntryUnitISOCode.description: The ISO code is important for EDI. It is used to convert the internal SAP measurement units into standard measurement units. Data exchange via EDI requires internal measurement units to be converted into standard measurement units.A list of the current internationally agreed ISO codes can be ordered from the UN commission responsible (WP.4 Trade Facilitation Recommendations, Recommendation 20):UN Economic Commission for EuropeInformation OfficePalais des Nations1211 GenevaSwitzerlande-mail: info.ece@unece.orgor viewed directly on the Internet:http://www.unece.org/cefact/codesfortrade/codes_index.htmFor more information, see SAP Note 69063.

EntryUnitSAPCode.title: Unit of Measurement, Internal SAP Code (No Conversion)

IsCompletelyDelivered.title: Indicates that the item is to be regarded as closed.

Material.title: Number of the material that is to be produced with this order.

MaterialDocument.title: Alphanumeric key uniquely identifying the document.
MaterialDocument.description: Number of the material document with which a goods movement was posted.Together with the material document year, the document number constitutes the key via which a material document is accessed.

MaterialDocumentItem.title: Specifies the number that uniquely identifies an item in .

MaterialDocumentItemText.title: Contains an explanatory text on the line item.
MaterialDocumentItemText.description: Line item texts can be used internally and externally. To be able to distinguish between these, you must begin texts for external use with "*". These texts can then be printed on all correspondence, dunning notices, payment advice notes, etc. The asterisk is removed when the text is printed.This function is only available in the FI component. It cannot be used in Materials Management.

MaterialDocumentYear.title: Calendar year in which the material document was posted.
MaterialDocumentYear.description: In conjunction with the document number, the material document year constitutes the key via which a material document is accessed.

ProductionSupplyArea.title: The production supply area (PSA) serves as a place for interim storage on the shop floor and is used to make material directly available for production purposes.
ProductionSupplyArea.description: The PSA is used in Kanban and JIT Outbound processing and in Extended Warehouse Management.

Reservation.title: Alphanumeric key uniquely identifying the document.

ReservationItem.title: Item Number of Reservation / Dependent Requirements

SalesOrder.title: Number of the sales order to which the order is to be settled.

SalesOrderItem.title: Item in the sales order to which the order is to be settled.

ShelfLifeExpirationDate.title: The date is set upon goods receipt in one of the following ways:
ShelfLifeExpirationDate.description: You enter it yourself.You enter a date of production, and the system calculates the shelf life expiration date from the date of production plus the shelf life in days (from the material master record).NoteThis date can still be changed upon receipt of the usage decision for an inspection lot.

StorageBin.title: The storage bin (sometimes referred to as a "slot") is the smallest addressable unit in a warehouse. It identifies the exact location in the warehouse where goods can be stored.
StorageBin.description: A storage bin can be further sub-divided into bin sections. Several different materials (quants) can be stored in one bin at the same time.

StorageType.title: The storage type is a subdivision of a complex, physical warehouse. Different storage types are identified by their warehousing technique, form of organization, or their function.
StorageType.description: A typical warehouse could have the following storage types:Goods receipt areaPicking areaHigh-rack storage areaBulk storage areaOpen storage areaGoods issue area

Supplier.title: Alphanumeric key uniquely identifying the document.
Supplier.description: With the supplier number, information from the supplier master record (such as the supplier's address and bank details) is copied into a purchasing document (such as a request for quotation or a purchase order).You can use the supplier number to keep track of requests for quotation, purchase orders and outline agreements.

WBSElementExternalID.title: External 24-character name of an operative WBS element without a conversion routine stored in the domain.

OrderOperationInternalID.title: Internal Identifier of an Operation or Activity

APIConfHasNoGoodsMovements.title: Confirmation: No Goods Movement via API
